editorial_note: Two-way NVIDIA/IREN deal — IREN deploys 5 GW of DSX, NVIDIA buys $3.4B of cloud back, plus a $2.1B equity-warrant overlay. Direct follow-up to the IREN-Mirantis acquisition: Mirantis appears as the orchestration layer.

related_articles.context: IREN's $625M Mirantis acquisition two days earlier — the operating-software prerequisite that makes the NVIDIA managed-cloud contract possible
Same-week parallel: a non-hyperscale GPU operator anchoring a frontier-AI customer at gigawatt scale
